name: preuser
description: Set up and triage preuser on a repo. /preuser:setup writes .preuser/config.yml for sandbox bring-up, static staging URLs, or post-deploy GitHub Deployment URLs. /preuser:status checks GitHub App connector visibility. /preuser:validate checks config shape. /preuser:seal commits only ciphertext for login values. /preuser:rescue diagnoses config, deployment handoff, reachability, auth, and run evidence. /preuser:feedback can send consented setup pain reports to preuser. Never writes raw secrets or pushes without your say-so.
